facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 406 divers reviewed it. Flipper diving club in Búng Gội, Phú Quốc keeps showing up at the top for a reason.

Whether you're a first-timer or already certified, this is the club locals and expats both point to when someone asks where to dive in Phu Quoc. Small groups. Serious instructors. Clear water.

If the ocean is on your Phu Quoc list, this one belongs on it too. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
